recommendations.title: The Thief of Bagdad
recommendations.overview: A recalcitrant thief vies with a duplicitous Mongol ruler for the hand of a beautiful princess.

recommendations.title: High Sierra
recommendations.overview: Given a pardon from jail, Roy Earle gets back into the swing of things as he robs a swanky resort.

recommendations.title: White Heat
recommendations.overview: A psychopathic criminal with a mother complex makes a daring break from prison and then leads his old gang in a chemical plant payroll heist. After the heist, events take a crazy turn.

recommendations.title: Captain Horatio Hornblower R.N.
recommendations.overview: Captain Horatio Hornblower leads his ship HMS Lydia on a perilous transatlantic voyage, during which his faithful crew battle both a Spanish warship and a ragged band of Central American rebels.

recommendations.title: They Died with Their Boots On
recommendations.overview: The story follows General George Armstrong Custer's adventures from his West Point days to his death. He defies orders during the Civil War, trains the 7th Cavalry, appeases Chief Crazy Horse and later engages in bloody battle with the Sioux nation.

recommendations.title: They Drive by Night
recommendations.overview: Joe and Paul Fabrini are Wildcat, or independent, truck drivers who have their own small one-truck business. The Fabrini boys constantly battle distributors, rivals and loan collectors, while trying to make a success of their transport company.

recommendations.title: The Enforcer
recommendations.overview: After years of investigation, Assistant District Attorney Martin Ferguson has managed to build a solid case against an elusive gangster whose top lieutenant is about to testify.

recommendations.title: Another You
recommendations.overview: George has been in a mental hospital for 3 years and is finally ready to go out into the real world again. Eddie Dash, a dedicated con-man, is supposed to keep him out of trouble, but when people begin to recognise George as a missing millionaire, Ed

recommendations.title: The Big Trail
recommendations.overview: Young scout Breck Coleman leads a wagon train along the dangerous trail to Oregon as he tries to get the affection of the beautiful pioneer Ruth Cameron and plans his revenge on the harsh scoundrels who murdered a friend of his in the past.

recommendations.title: Barbie and the Secret Door
recommendations.overview: A shy princess discovers a secret door in her kingdom and enters a magical world full of magical creatures. She meets a mermaid and a fairy who tell her about a spoiled ruler threatening them.
